tickers.one_line_thesis: DataSection is betting the Neo Cloud franchise on hyperscaler-linked AI data centres in Japan (Inzai) and Australia, with a FY2026 revenue step-up to ¥33.6B still guided post-Apr-2026 delays; the May 2026 shift to NVIDIA B300 via Compal (~USD 325M) and a disclosed financing bridge improves execution visibility but raises contract-renegotiation, debt-timing, and Giga-order overhang risk.

Japan's dominant exchange and clearing infrastructure — a Stahl croupier with ~58% operating margins and volume leverage — but earnings are cyclical with market turnover; do not treat FY2025 peak activity as a permanent baseline.

Dominant e-commerce + AWS platform compounding at scale (FY2025 $717B sales, $78B NI) with AWS re-accelerating (+28% Q1-26) and high-margin ads/chips engines emerging — but AI capex has temporarily collapsed FCF, requiring disciplined valuation and capex ROI monitoring.

AI data centre developer with accelerating revenue ($126.6M FQ3, +139% YoY) and 600+ MW of signed leases (CoreWeave, hyperscaler). FQ3 GAAP net income $100.9M includes $59.7M discontinued-operation gain (Cloud held-for-sale); continuing ops still loss-making on adjusted basis. Customer concentration and layered debt/preferred stack require capital-structure diligence before conviction sizing.

Global alternative-asset compounder earning durable fee streams on $614B fee-bearing capital with scaling insurance/wealth platform ($180B assets), active buybacks, and corporate simplification (BN+BNT merge) — DE-focused valuation, not GAAP NI.
At ~$549, headline 3.07% per year (7yr blend) combines owner cash, scenarios, and NAV optionality; Lawrence cash alone is -1.4% while probability-weighted economic NAV is ~$1,480/sh.

human_review.notes: Economic NAV ~$1,480/sh and synthesis weights approved 2026-06-03; headline 2.91% (7yr blend); Lawrence cash -1.4% is accumulate bar.

tickers.one_line_thesis: CMSG is a cash-rich OTCQX bitcoin/scrypt miner where marked-to-market digital assets dominate GAAP earnings; the equity is largely a BTC-treasury and hash-share option under Horizon-affiliated governance — watch at 8.7% blended IRR (Marvin floor 7.7%); approved Substacks (LCI seigniorage) add partial treasury credit; fee redesign post-2026 and network-share trends.
Global salvage-vehicle auction toll booth de-rated to ~$33 — oligopoly economics intact; base IRR 9.2% (core override) while monitoring U.S. assignment/fee growth and Q3 FY2026 trends.
Wide-moat CRE platform de-rated to ~$33 (−54% YoY); Homes.com/Matterport distort GAAP — watch at 8.6% base IRR until normalized FCF proves out.
Decentralized VMS acquirer reinvesting FCFA2S at hurdle rates — base 16.0% IRR supports core stance; GAAP net income secondary to FCFA2S compounding.
DBS-driven life science/diagnostics platform — hold at 10.1% base IRR (quality override); cyclically tied to biopharma funding and China diagnostics recovery.
MAC-anchored ASX royalty at ~5% yield with Thacker Pass lithium option; 8.0% base five-year return at A$4.43; watch pending ASX doc pipeline and iron ore cycle.

Horizon Kinetics–affiliated holding company with concentrated stakes in exchange infrastructure (MIH) and HKHC — a look-through bet on Murray Stahl's ecosystem, not an operating croupier; value = sum-of-parts vs fair-value accounting noise.

Search/YouTube ads cash engine plus Google Cloud AI infrastructure (+63% Q1 2026) — wide-moat compounder betting massive capex ($180–190B 2026) on Cloud ROI while navigating AI disruption to Search monetization.

Global exchange and market-infrastructure croupier with 20 consecutive record revenue years and ~80% exchange margins — quality toll booth, but Lawrence base IRR ~11% at $156 sits below the 15% hold band on mid-cycle FCF; watch for pullback or bull-case volume.

human_review.override_reason: Human approved hold 2026-05-29: incumbent croupier sleeve; live price ~$153; add near $115-125 for ~15% base annual return.
human_review.notes: Human override to hold: incumbent croupier sleeve despite base IRR below 15%.

tickers.one_line_thesis: Michigan mineral royalty optionality (>1M acres, Copperwood/Highland Copper leases) with patient balance sheet — asymmetric upside if mining develops, steady burn and single-tenant concentration until royalties activate.
Delaware Basin land toll with strong FY2025 cash proof, but Class A-attributable owner cash at ~$73 yields ~1.8% Lawrence base — watch for price or governance/cash-attribution improvement.

human_review.override_reason: Scarce Delaware acreage and fee-based model give partial dhando, but ~1.8% Lawrence base at $73, Up-C sponsor control, and ~$560M debt cap stance despite growth narrative

tickers.one_line_thesis: Global data/index/clearing croupier with 50%+ margins and strong cash conversion; quality franchise at ~£91 implies 12.6% base return — watch below 15% bar.
At ~$633, Meta's Family of Apps funds AI capex and Reality Labs; Lawrence base annual return 5.9% (watch stance) pending proof that $125–145B 2026 capex earns owner cash.

Mesabi Trust is a contractual iron ore pellet royalty on Cleveland-Cliffs' Northshore (Silver Bay, MN): cash is cyclical commodity + bonus-tier optionality, with ongoing AAA arbitration (commenced Sep 2025) layered on statutory trust simplicity—hold at 8.4% normalized yield for the incumbent royalty sleeve; do not downgrade on depressed Q1 bonus alone.

U.S. OTC market infrastructure and ATS operator — a Stahl croupier with subscription-heavy fees and expanding disclosure tiers (OTCID) and extended-hours trading — earnings scale with issuer count and activity, not balance-sheet risk.
Post-merger diagnostics platform (Quidel + Ortho) with improving adjusted margins but declining revenue — integration and non-respiratory growth must prove out before this is a compounder again.

human_review.override_reason: Blended IRR clears 15% band; moat unproven caps at hold not accumulate

tickers.one_line_thesis: Passive San Juan Basin gas NPI royalty trust — equity yield curve / time arbitrage on temporary Hilcorp capex deficit (no distributions since May 2024); re-rating potential when distributions resume if unit price discounts recoverable NPI rather than terminal wind-down.
AI Data Cloud platform on consumption pricing: strong product growth and positive FCF, but watch at ~$240 (~6.7% base IRR) until owner cash per share proves at post-earnings run rate.

Essential financial intelligence — ratings, indices, and data subscriptions — a Stahl croupier / index infrastructure compounder with extraordinary margins; earnings leverage to issuance and AUM with cyclicality at the margin.

Swedish industrial serial acquirer of niche subsidiaries — decentralized Pabrai-style model with 2025–2026 margin/FCF turnaround underway; organic sales still negative while unprofitable units are pruned.
Permian land, royalty, and water toll at ~$393: durable moat, falsifier-adjusted base -1.0%, NAV overlay ~$211/sh vs price — watch for better entry.

Post-EWSR generic pharma; 13.61% synthesis IRR ($1.50/sh 50/50 Marvin/Rosen); floor 9.9% on $1.45. Rosen Sohn: Idorsia Phase III + cash-yield re-rating (catalyst capped, not 12mo double in base). ~$14B net debt; watch.

human_review.override_reason: Blended synthesis ~14% approaches hold band; leverage and unproven moat keep watch until readouts or deleveraging
notes: Idorsia P_base 30% and $6/sh incremental are [Assumption] until readout data
Rosen 12-month double not in base IRR; capped 2-year $24 payoff path in synthesis only

tickers.one_line_thesis: Delaware Basin produced-water infrastructure with strong Adj. EBITDA growth ($254M FY2025) and ~2,500 miles of pipe — asset-heavy midstream toll model, not Stahl croupier; thesis blocked by IPO/combination complexity and Five Point sponsor control.

darwin.disclaimer: IRA paper portfolio / research tool. Not tax or investment advice. Inspired by Darwin AI Ventures public positioning and 1Q26 letter themes; does not replicate proprietary models.

portfolio_explanation.summary: We hold 12 names under **genetic** in a **calm** regime. Genetic search picked a genome that blends policy type and scoring knobs on in-sample history. Largest positions: ICE 13.54%, BN 13.54%, 8697.T 13.54%.
portfolio_explanation.mechanism: Genetic search picked a genome that blends policy type and scoring knobs on in-sample history.

drivers.role: Primary rank input for IRA / IRR policies
0 names with deep dive older than review threshold
Max weight, min names, turnover, stance caps

popper_falsifiers: If OOS Sharpe for ML policies falls below gate, champion reverts to IRA Marvin.
If turnover budget is breached, next rebalance scales trades toward prior weights.
If regime shifts to stressed, turnover multiplier and caps tighten automatically.
flags: Exploration mode: champion may not be production-safe ML.
Names below min IRR gate (6.0%) still held at small weights: 8697.T, AMZN, GOOGL, KEWL, TPL

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights follow published mandate rules and Marvin research inputs, not a fitted price target.

macro_events.description: Curated macro event dates (FOMC decision days, CPI release days). Refresh quarterly.

items.note: Broad-index macro; applies to index-linked YB

breaches.label: Gross exposure % NAV
breaches.action: Reduce gross or explicitly approve temporary breach before adding risk.
